jsonLd.title: Ambrane is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ambrane! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ambrane:
Ambrane is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambrane!
